Name: UNavMovementComponent
Description: NavMovementComponent defines base functionality for MovementComponents that move any 'agent' that may be involved in AI pathfinding.

Variables.Name: NavAgentProps
Variables.Description: Properties that define how the component can move.

Variables.Name: FixedPathBrakingDistance
Variables.Description: Braking distance override used with acceleration driven path following (bUseAccelerationForPaths)

Variables.Name: bUpdateNavAgentWithOwnersCollision
Variables.Description: If set to true NavAgentProps' radius and height will be updated with Owner's collision capsule size

Variables.Name: bUseAccelerationForPaths
Variables.Description: If set, pathfollowing will control character movement via acceleration values. If false, it will set velocities directly.

Variables.Name: bUseFixedBrakingDistanceForPaths
Variables.Description: If set, FixedPathBrakingDistance will be used for path following deceleration

Variables.Name: MovementState
Variables.Description: Expresses runtime state of character's movement. Put all temporal changes to movement properties here

Functions.Name: StopActiveMovement
Functions.Description: Stops applying further movement (usually zeros acceleration).

Functions.Name: StopMovementKeepPathing
Functions.Description: Stops movement immediately (reset velocity) but keeps following current path

Return.Description: true if currently falling (not flying, in a non-fluid volume, and not on the ground)
true if currently moving on the ground (e.g. walking or driving)
true if currently swimming (moving through a fluid volume)
true if currently flying (moving through a non-fluid volume without resting on the ground)
